panels.description: Final values from the 2026-06-17 5-minute unoptimized/optimized comparison run.

panels.description: Final values from the 2026-06-17 5-minute unoptimized/optimized comparison run.

panels.description: Final values from the 2026-06-17 5-minute unoptimized/optimized comparison run.

panels.description: Final values from the 2026-06-17 5-minute unoptimized/optimized comparison run.

panels.title: 5m Compare: Agent SLO Over Time
panels.description: Run-labelled full-agent signals. Use Last 15 minutes to see unoptimized first, optimized second.

panels.title: README Serving Health: Latency And Queue
panels.description: Serving-layer signals README asks for: vLLM request latency, time-to-first-token, and scheduler queue/running requests.

panels.title: README Serving Health: Throughput And KV Cache
panels.description: Serving-layer throughput and capacity headroom: request throughput, token throughput, KV usage, prefix-cache hit rate, preemptions.

panels.title: Final SLO: Optimized RPS
panels.description: Final clean optimized 300s run from load_test JSON.

panels.title: Final SLO: Optimized P95
panels.description: Final clean optimized 300s run from load_test JSON.

panels.title: Baseline P95
panels.description: Baseline 300s comparison run from load_test summary.

panels.title: Final SLO: Requests in 5m
panels.description: 3900 requests scheduled over the clean optimized 300s run.

panels.title: Agent SLO: Full-run RPS (5m)
panels.description: True full agent /answer runs per second over 5 minutes, filtered to the clean baseline/optimized Phase 6 comparison runs.

panels.title: Agent SLO: P95 end-to-end latency (5m)
panels.description: True end-to-end /answer p95 latency over 5 minutes, filtered to the clean baseline/optimized Phase 6 comparison runs.

panels.title: Agent SLO: Error rate (5m)
panels.description: Fraction of full agent runs ending in an error response over 5 minutes, filtered to the clean baseline/optimized Phase 6 comparison runs.

panels.title: Agent SLO: Requests in 5m
panels.description: Number of full agent runs observed in the last 5 minutes, filtered to the clean baseline/optimized Phase 6 comparison runs.

panels.title: Agent SLO comparison over time
panels.description: Clean Phase 6 full-agent SLO comparison only: baseline vs optimized. Stale none/contaminated runs are intentionally filtered out.

panels.title: vLLM: Request RPS (5m)
panels.description: Raw vLLM chat/completion request rate, not full agent-run RPS. One full agent run can make multiple vLLM calls. Full-agent SLO RPS comes from load_test JSON total_requests / wall_clock_seconds.

panels.title: vLLM: P95 request latency (5m)
panels.description: Raw vLLM request p95, not end-to-end full-agent latency. Full-agent p95 comes from load_test JSON latency_p95.

panels.title: vLLM: Waiting requests
panels.description: Scheduler backlog. Sustained non-zero values indicate saturation.

panels.title: vLLM: KV cache usage
panels.description: KV cache headroom for concurrency.

panels.title: Request latency percentiles
panels.description: End-to-end request latency. Use P95/P99 for SLO checks and P50 for baseline behavior.

panels.title: Latency by lifecycle phase
panels.description: P95 latency split by queue, prefill, decode, and total inference time.

panels.title: Token latency
panels.description: Time to first token and inter-token latency percentiles.

panels.title: Request throughput
panels.description: Successful requests per second, broken down by finish reason.

panels.title: Token throughput
panels.description: Prompt and generated tokens processed per second.

panels.title: Scheduler pressure
panels.description: Requests currently running versus waiting in the scheduler queue.

panels.title: KV cache usage
panels.description: Fraction of available KV cache in use. Sustained high usage means less concurrency headroom.

panels.title: Prefix cache hit ratio
panels.description: Share of queried prefix-cache tokens that were cache hits.

panels.title: KV cache preemptions
panels.description: Rate of request preemptions. Non-zero values usually mean memory pressure or too much concurrency.

panels.title: Request token distribution
panels.description: P95 prompt and generation token counts per request.

panels.title: Iteration token batch size
panels.description: Engine-step token batch size. Larger batches usually indicate better batching under load.
